mapper.select:
SELECT ECCT.BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.BUYER_CD) AS BUYER_NM , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT , ECCT.PROGRESS_CD , ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD ,(ECCT.CONT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_DATE ,(ECCT.ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS ORIGIN_CONT_START_DATE ,(ECCT.CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_START_DATE ,(ECCT.CONT_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS CONT_END_DATE , ECCT.CONT_DESC , ECCT.CONT_AMT , ECCT.CUR , ECCT.VAT_TYPE , ECCT.CONT_RMK , ECCT.CONT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CONT_USER_NM , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND UUID = ECCT.ATT_FILE_NUM AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT , ECCT.ATT_FILE_NUM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD ,GETCUSTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD) AS PR_BUYER_NM , ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , ECCM.VENDOR_CD ,GETVENDORNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , ECCM.METHOD_TYPE , ECCM.PAY_TERMS , ECCM.PO_CREATE_FLAG , ECCM.IV_TYPE ,(SELECT MAX(EXEC_NUM) FROM STOCECMT WHERE GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS EXEC_NUM ,(ECCT.IF_YN, '0') AS IF_YN -- ITPortal I/F 여부(2021.08.10) ,(SELECT MAX(PRHD.IF_TYPE) FROM STOCECMT ECMT JOIN STOCPRDT PRDT ON (PRDT.GATE_CD = ECMT.GATE_CD AND PRDT.BUYER_CD = ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD AND PRDT.PR_NUM = ECMT.PR_NUM AND PRDT.PR_SQ = ECMT.PR_SQ AND PRDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPRHD PRHD ON (PRHD.GATE_CD = PRDT.GATE_CD AND PRHD.BUYER_CD = PRDT.BUYER_CD AND PRHD.PR_NUM = PRDT.PR_NUM AND PRHD.IF_TYPE IS NOT NULL AND PRHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECMT.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS IF_TYPE FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECCM ECCM ON (ECCT.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND ECCT.MANUAL_CONT_FLAG = '1' -- 수기계약건만 조회
AND ECCT.CONT_DATE >= (#{REG_DATE_FROM}) AND ECCT.CONT_DATE <= (#{REG_DATE_TO})
AND ECCT.CONT_END_DATE >= (#{REG_DATE_FROM}) AND ECCT.CONT_END_DATE <= (#{REG_DATE_TO})
AND UPPER(ECCT.CONT_USER_ID) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_ID}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETUSERNAME(ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.CONT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{CONT_USER_NM}) '%'
AND (UPPER(ECCT.CONT_DESC) LIKE UPPER('%' #{CONT_NUM} '%') OR UPPER(ECCT.CONT_NUM) LIKE UPPER('%' #{CONT_NUM} '%'))
AND UPPER(ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETCUSTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD)) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_BUYER_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETDEPTNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD, ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PR_DEPT_NM}) '%'
AND UPPER(ECCM.VENDOR_CD) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_CD}) '%'
AND UPPER(GETVENDORNAME(ECCM.GATE_CD, ECCM.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd})) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{VENDOR_NM}) '%'
AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY ECCT.PROGRESS_CD, ECCT.CONT_NUM DESC

SELECT ECMT.CONT_NUM , ECMT.CONT_CNT , ECMT.PR_NUM , ECMT.PR_SQ , ECMT.ITEM_CD , ECMT.ITEM_DESC , ECMT.ITEM_SPEC , ECMT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', ECMT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , ECMT.MAKER_PART_NO , ECMT.ORIGIN_CD , ECMT.ITEM_QT , ECMT.UNIT_CD , ECMT.ITEM_PRC AS UNIT_PRC , ECMT.ITEM_AMT , ECMT.PURCHASE_TYPE , ECMT.BUYER_CD , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECCT.GATE_CD, ECCT.BUYER_CD, ECCT.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD, ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(ECMT.GATE_CD, ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD, ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , (ECMT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DATE , (ECMT.RMK) AS RMK , ECMT.EXEC_NUM , ECMT.EXEC_SQ , ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECMT ECMT ON (ECMT.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{SCH_BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{SCH_CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{SCH_CONT_CNT} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCPOHD ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , PO_NUM , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , DEPT_CD , PROGRESS_CD , PO_CREATE_TYPE , SUBJECT , VENDOR_CD , PO_CREATE_DATE , CUR , PO_AMT , VAT_TYPE , CTRL_USER_ID , INSPECT_USER_ID , APPROVAL_FLAG , SIGN_STATUS , VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS , FORCE_CLOSE_FLAG ) SELECT ECCT.GATE_CD AS GATE_CD , ECCT.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD , #{PO_NUM} AS PO_NUM , SYSDATE AS REG_DATE , ECCT.REG_USER_ID AS REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE AS MOD_DATE , ECCT.MOD_USER_ID AS MOD_USER_ID , '0' AS DEL_FLAG , ECCT.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , '100' AS PROGRESS_CD ,(CASE WHEN #{EXEC_NUM} IS NULL THEN 'MANUAL' ELSE 'MDRAFT' END) AS PO_CREATE_TYPE , ECCT.CONT_DESC AS SUBJECT , ECCM.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD , SYSDATE AS PO_CREATE_DATE , ECCT.CUR AS CUR , ECCM.CONT_AMT AS PO_AMT , ECCT.VAT_TYPE AS VAT_TYPE , ECCT.CONT_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID ,(#{IV_USER_ID}, ECCT.CONT_USER_ID) AS INSPECT_USER_ID , '0' AS APPROVAL_FLAG , 'T' AS SIGN_STATUS , '0' AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS , '0' AS FORCE_CLOSE_FLAG FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECCM ECCM ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECCM.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECCM.PO_CREATE_FLAG = '1' AND ECCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

INSERT INTO STOCPODT ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , PO_NUM , PO_SQ , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , PURCHASE_TYPE , ITEM_CD , ITEM_DESC , ITEM_SPEC , MAKER_CD , MAKER_PART_NO , ORIGIN_CD , PO_QT , UNIT_CD , UNIT_PRC , ITEM_AMT , DUE_DATE , RMK , PR_NUM , PR_SQ , EXEC_NUM , EXEC_SQ , PB_BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , ITEM_SQ ) SELECT ECMT.GATE_CD -- GATE_CD , ECMT.BUYER_CD -- BUYER_CD , #{PO_NUM} -- PO_NUM , ROWNUM -- PO_SQ , SYSDATE -- REG_DATE , ECCT.REG_USER_ID -- REG_USER_ID , SYSDATE -- MOD_DATE , ECCT.REG_USER_ID -- MOD_USER_ID , '0' -- DEL_FLAG , '100' -- PROGRESS_CD , ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD -- PR_BUYER_CD , ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD -- PR_DEPT_CD , ECMT.PURCHASE_TYPE -- PURCHASE_TYPE , ECMT.ITEM_CD -- ITEM_CD , ECMT.ITEM_DESC -- ITEM_DESC , ECMT.ITEM_SPEC -- ITEM_SPEC , ECMT.MAKER_CD -- MAKER_CD , ECMT.MAKER_PART_NO -- MAKER_PART_NO , ECMT.ORIGIN_CD -- ORIGIN_CD , ECMT.ITEM_QT -- PO_QT , ECMT.UNIT_CD -- UNIT_CD , ECMT.ITEM_PRC -- UNIT_PRC , ECMT.ITEM_AMT -- ITEM_AMT , ECMT.DUE_DATE -- DUE_DATE , null -- RMK , ECMT.PR_NUM -- PR_NUM , ECMT.PR_SQ -- PR_SQ , ECMT.EXEC_NUM -- EXEC_NUM , ECMT.EXEC_SQ -- EXEC_SQ , ECMT.PB_BUYER_CD , ECCT.CONT_NUM , ECCT.CONT_CNT , ECMT.ITEM_SQ FROM STOCECCT ECCT JOIN STOCECCM ECCM ON (ECCM.GATE_CD = ECCT.GATE_CD AND ECCM.BUYER_CD = ECCT.BUYER_CD AND ECCM.CONT_NUM = ECCT.CONT_NUM AND ECCM.CONT_CNT = ECCT.CONT_CNT AND ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD = #{PR_BUYER_CD} AND ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD = #{PR_DEPT_CD} AND ECCM.VENDOR_CD = #{VENDOR_CD} AND ECCM.PO_CREATE_FLAG = '1' AND ECCM.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCECMT ECMT ON (ECMT.GATE_CD = ECCM.GATE_CD AND ECMT.BUYER_CD = ECCM.BUYER_CD AND ECMT.CONT_NUM = ECCM.CONT_NUM AND ECMT.CONT_CNT = ECCM.CONT_CNT AND ECMT.PR_BUYER_CD = ECCM.PR_BUYER_CD AND ECMT.PR_DEPT_CD = ECCM.PR_DEPT_CD AND ECMT.VENDOR_CD = ECCM.VENDOR_CD AND ECMT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND ECCT.DEL_FLAG = '0'

MERGE INTO STOCECCM A USING (SELECT #{ses.gateCd} AS GATE_CD , #{BUYER_CD} AS BUYER_CD , #{CONT_NUM} AS CONT_NUM , #{CONT_CNT} AS CONT_CNT , #{PR_BUYER_CD} AS PR_BUYER_CD , #{PR_DEPT_CD} AS PR_DEPT_CD , #{VENDOR_CD} AS VENDOR_CD ) B ON (A.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND A.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND A.CONT_NUM = B.CONT_NUM AND A.CONT_CNT = B.CONT_CNT AND A.PR_BUYER_CD = B.PR_BUYER_CD AND A.PR_DEPT_CD = B.PR_DEPT_CD AND A.VENDOR_CD = B.VENDOR_CD AND A.PROGRESS_CD = '4300' AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MOD_DATE = SYSDATE , MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} , CONT_AMT = #{CONT_AMT} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , CONT_NUM , CONT_CNT , PR_BUYER_CD , PR_DEPT_CD , VENDOR_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , PROGRESS_CD , CONT_AMT ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} , (#{BUYER_CD}, #{ses.companyCd}) , #{CONT_NUM} , #{CONT_CNT} , #{PR_BUYER_CD} , #{PR_DEPT_CD} , #{VENDOR_CD} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , '4300' , #{CONT_AMT} )
